_meta.description: Canonical run config for the bngsim-vs-RoadRunner SSA cross-engine screen (GH #108). The per-model spec is ssa_candidates.json (which biomodels) plus the roundtrip suite; THIS file pins the global run knobs the committed baseline (ssa_baseline.json) was produced at, so a fresh run and the regression diff are apples-to-apples. `jobs` (parallelism) and `biomodels_sbml_dir` are environment-specific and deliberately NOT pinned here. NOTE (GH #190): n_replicates was raised 30->100 for tighter ensemble-runtime statistics; because the z-gate standard error shrinks like 1/sqrt(N), mean_z_tol and self_z_tol were scaled by sqrt(100/30) (5.0->9.13, 4.0->7.30) so the correctness gate still detects the same minimum *meaningful* difference rather than mechanically flagging tinier ones, and per_model_timeout_sec was raised 40->120 so the slower 100-replicate ensembles complete. If you change n_replicates, rescale the z-tols by sqrt(N/30).
